# Bamberg Digital

Bamberg Digital is a Sacramento, California-based founder-led digital agency specializing in custom website design, SEO systems, and lead generation for small businesses nationwide. Founded by Jason Bamberg, the agency combines AI-powered automation with hands-on human oversight to deliver agency-quality results at accessible price points — custom websites from $497, SEO from $297/mo, and lead generation from $199/mo. Bamberg Digital has shipped 47+ projects across industries and maintains a library of 47 industry-specific website blueprints covering verticals from dental practices to breweries to law firms.

- Services (Lead Generation): https://www.bambergdigital.com/leads

- Atelier — custom solutions, $10K–$25K, one client per quarter: https://www.bambergdigital.com/atelier
